ground_truth.title: Flights: Find Cheap Flights & Airfares | Priceline
ground_truth.main_content: Find your next flight deal. Priceline helps travelers uncover serious savings with powerful tools, flexible options, and deals. Round-trip and one-way flight search options available with departure and destination locations, date selection, traveler count, and cabin class choices. Bundle + Save options available to add hotels and rental cars. Best Ways to Book Cheap Flights: Thursday, Friday, or Saturday is best for domestic airfare—potentially up to 12% savings. For international flights, Thursday is cheapest while Sundays tend to be most expensive. Fridays and Saturdays are most expensive return days; Monday returns can trim 12% off fares. Departing Saturday and returning Tuesday often offers cheapest round-trip pricing—saving up to 30%. September and February are cheapest months for domestic travel; December, March, and June are priciest. Express Deals offer up to 50% off retail fares in exchange for flexible booking. Priceline offers exclusive deals, a deals engine that builds round trip itineraries mixing airlines, and VIP program perks. Flight deals available to Phoenix from Los Angeles for $57, to Miami from Detroit for $67, to Las Vegas from Santa Ana for $67.
with: Flying out on a Thursday, Friday, or Saturday is your best bet for saving on domestic airfare—potentially up to 12% compared to peak departure days
Departing on a Saturday and returning on a Tuesday often offers the cheapest round-trip pricing, saving up to 30% on airfare
September is typically the cheapest month to fly, followed closely by February
Express Deals offer deeply discounted fares up to 50% off retail rates
